scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/api"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w apps/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/web && npm run typecheck -w apps/api
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:api
scripts.test:smoke: npm run test:smoke -w apps/web && npm run test:smoke -w apps/api
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test:smoke
